sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31228" key="ei)rw/neuma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰρών-ευμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, in pl., <sense id="n31228.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ironies</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> </bibl> Tyr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:24:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24.5</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:38:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
